tracks.rawText: 4:56Take My Handv5.5Psychedelic rock, cosmic guitars, swirling analog synths, dreamy atmosphere, hypnotic grooves, vintage tape saturation, trippy reverb, experimental soundscapes, emotional electric guitar solos, ethereal vocals, mind-bending transitions, cinematic psychedelic journey, floating melodies, warm analog textures, spacey echoes, surreal sonic atmosphere, deep bass pulse, progressive arrangements, hallucinogenic vibes, retro-futuristic energy, immersive stereo soundpsicodelicPublishRemix
tracks.title: Take My Hand

tracks.rawText: 1:29Studio Selectionv4.5-allCoverBoom bap hip hop at 92 BPM in C minor with a melancholic minor-key piano loop, dusty vinyl crackle, punchy dry kick on 1 and 3, crisp layered snare on 2 and 4, and steady 16th-note closed hats, Deep sub synth doubles the root notes, Rapid-fire Spanish rap is dry, upfront, unpolished, with no harmonies or sweetening1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 1:58Studio Selectionv4.5-allCoverBoom bap hip hop, A melancholic piano loop plays a minor key progression with a slight vinyl crackle effect, The drum kit features a punchy, dry kick on beats 1 and 3, with a crisp, layered snare on 2 and 4, A steady 16th-note closed hi-hat pattern provides rhythmic drive, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the piano's root notes, Male vocals are delivered in a rapid-fire, rhythmic Spanish rap style with a dry, upfront mix, The tempo is 92 BPM in the key of C minorPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 8:00Velvet Anvilv4.5-allPsychedelic rock with metal edge: dreamy analog synth pads, vinyl crackle, distant feedback, and slow-burning fuzz guitar leads, Hypnotic female vocals sit in lush reverb and delay, with soaring chorus layers, Thick bass, tom-heavy drums, phased arpeggios, and cosmic wah-soaked solos drive a mystical, heavy, expansive texturePublishRemix
tracks.title: Velvet Anvil

tracks.rawText: 4:05Huéhuetl Cometsv4.5-allPsytrance at 145 BPM with driving kick, rolling offbeat bass, and stark negative space between phrases, Prehispanic Mexican colors from huéhuetl drum hits, teponaztli wood slaps, ayoyote rattles, conch horn bursts, and serpent-like flute motifs, Psychedelic arps, resonant filter sweeps, gated delays, and dry, punchy percussionPublishRemix
tracks.title: Huéhuetl Comets

tracks.title: Huéhuetl Comets

tracks.rawText: 4:20Saffron Thunderingv5.5High-energy Vedic metal track featuring aggressive male chanting vocals over a fusion of traditional Indian percussion and heavy thrash metal instrumentation, The arrangement is driven by rapid-fire double-kick drumming and distorted electric guitar riffs that mirror the rhythmic patterns of the Sanskrit verses, The vocal delivery is rhythmic and percussive, utilizing a deep, resonant baritone with a staccato cadence, The production is dense and powerful, with a prominent low-end and sharp, biting guitar tones, The tempo is fast, approximately 140 BPM, maintaining a relentless and intense energy throughout, Traditional elements like the dhol or mridangam are layered with the drum kit to create a unique folk-metal hybrid sound, The song structure is linear and repetitive, building intensity through vocal layering and increasing instrumental complexity1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Saffron Thundering

tracks.rawText: 3:40Saffron Thunderingv5.5High-energy Vedic metal track featuring aggressive male chanting vocals over a fusion of traditional Indian percussion and heavy thrash metal instrumentation, The arrangement is driven by rapid-fire double-kick drumming and distorted electric guitar riffs that mirror the rhythmic patterns of the Sanskrit verses, The vocal delivery is rhythmic and percussive, utilizing a deep, resonant baritone with a staccato cadence, The production is dense and powerful, with a prominent low-end and sharp, biting guitar tones, The tempo is fast, approximately 140 BPM, maintaining a relentless and intense energy throughout, Traditional elements like the dhol or mridangam are layered with the drum kit to create a unique folk-metal hybrid sound, The song structure is linear and repetitive, building intensity through vocal layering and increasing instrumental complexityPublishRemix
